structure.text:
Subject: NCM-P-2025-06-20 Updated CalHFA Income Limits
From: Nova Capital Markets <capitalmarkets@novahomeloans.com>
Date: 2025-06-20 13:28:01-07:00

 



ANNOUNCEMENT SUMMARY

Effective immediately, income limits for CalHFA first mortgages, MyHome Assistance Program, and MyAccess have been updated. This does not affect income limits for the CalHFA Low Income Rate Eligibility. Please see the attached income limit document for additional detail. 

You can access CalHFA marketing material by following the link below. 

 Marketing <https://novahomeloans.sharepoint.com/:f:/s/Home/Em67UTZJUE5JrMQT4amueP8B8jQyqRVi5DjdD9agsJ-tjA?e=6kBwRA> 

 

Attachments

*	Updated income limits

FOR MORE INFORMATION… 

*	For Underwriting inquiries, contact Underwriting <mailto:jumbodelegatedunderwriting@novahomeloans.com>  
*	For Product inquiries, contact Product <mailto:productdept@novahomeloans.com>  
*	For Pricing inquiries, contact Lock Desk <mailto:lock.desk@novahomeloans.com> 

 

** For NOVA Home Loans Internal Distribution Only **

To find additional information, follow this path: NOVANet > Capital Markets <https://novahomeloans.sharepoint.com/sites/Home/SitePages/Capital-Markets.aspx>
